anilist.title: AniList
anilist.description: Connect your AniList account to sync your anime list.
anilist.notConfigured: AniList is not configured in this build.
anilist.connectError: Could not connect to AniList. Please try again.
anilist.disconnectError: Could not disconnect. Please try again.
anilist.desktopOnly: AniList connection is only available in the desktop app.

sync.title: List synchronization
sync.description: Two-way sync with AniList: imports your AniList list and pushes local changes back. On the first sync your AniList list takes precedence; afterwards, the most recently changed side wins.
sync.confirmDescription: This imports your AniList list into ShiroAni and pushes local changes (progress, status, score, notes) back to your AniList account — it may add or modify entries there. On the first sync your AniList list takes precedence for conflicts; afterwards, the most recently changed side wins. Episode progress always keeps the higher number.
sync.confirmPushDescription: Push-only mode sends your entire local library to AniList and OVERWRITES existing AniList entries so they match your local list (your local list always wins), creating any that are missing. It never changes your local list. A large library may take a few minutes.
sync.confirmPullDescription: Pull-only mode replaces your local entries with your AniList list (AniList wins) and imports anything missing. It never writes to your AniList account.
sync.summary: Imported {{imported}} · created on AniList {{pushedNew}} · updated locally {{updatedLocal}} · updated on AniList {{updatedRemote}}.

twoWay.label: Two-way
twoWay.hint: Imports your AniList list and pushes local changes back (the original behaviour).

push.label: Push only
push.hint: Sends your local library to AniList on every sync; never changes your local list.

pull.label: Pull only
pull.hint: Brings your AniList list into ShiroAni on every sync; never writes to your AniList account.

push.dialogDescription: Send your entire local library to AniList. This never modifies your local list.

createMissing.label: Only add missing
createMissing.hint: Create entries AniList doesn't have yet. Existing AniList entries are left untouched.

overwrite.label: Overwrite existing
overwrite.hint: Create missing entries and rewrite existing ones so AniList matches your local library (local wins).

push.warning: Pushing a large library can take a few minutes — AniList limits how fast entries can be written.

mal.title: MyAnimeList
mal.description: Connect your MyAnimeList account to sync your anime list.
mal.notConfigured: MyAnimeList is not configured in this build.
mal.connectError: Could not connect to MyAnimeList. Please try again.
mal.disconnectError: Could not disconnect. Please try again.
mal.desktopOnly: MyAnimeList connection is only available in the desktop app.

sync.title: List synchronization
sync.description: Two-way sync with MyAnimeList: imports your MAL list and pushes local changes back. On the first sync your MAL list takes precedence; afterwards, the most recently changed side wins.
sync.confirmDescription: This imports your MyAnimeList list into ShiroAni and pushes local changes (progress, status, score, notes) back to your MyAnimeList account — it may add or modify entries there. On the first sync your MAL list takes precedence for conflicts; afterwards, the most recently changed side wins. Episode progress always keeps the higher number.
sync.confirmPushDescription: Push-only mode sends your entire local library to MyAnimeList and OVERWRITES existing MAL entries so they match your local list (your local list always wins), creating any that are missing. It never changes your local list. A large library may take a few minutes.
sync.confirmPullDescription: Pull-only mode replaces your local entries with your MyAnimeList list (MAL wins) and imports anything missing. It never writes to your MyAnimeList account.
sync.summary: Imported {{imported}} · created on MAL {{pushedNew}} · updated locally {{updatedLocal}} · updated on MAL {{updatedRemote}}.

twoWay.label: Two-way
twoWay.hint: Imports your MyAnimeList list and pushes local changes back (the original behaviour).

push.label: Push only
push.hint: Sends your local library to MyAnimeList on every sync; never changes your local list.

pull.label: Pull only
pull.hint: Brings your MyAnimeList list into ShiroAni on every sync; never writes to your MAL account.

push.dialogDescription: Send your entire local library to MyAnimeList. This never modifies your local list.

createMissing.label: Only add missing
createMissing.hint: Create entries MyAnimeList doesn't have yet. Existing MAL entries are left untouched.

overwrite.label: Overwrite existing
overwrite.hint: Create missing entries and rewrite existing ones so MyAnimeList matches your local library (local wins).

push.warning: Pushing a large library can take a few minutes — MyAnimeList limits how fast entries can be written.
